subtitle: Back to work after weekend; Marie and James both away
context: You're back in the office after the weekend. Two key colleagues are on annual leave: Marie Cooksey (8-13 June) and James Salas Guillen (returning 18 June). Multiple urgent technical issues from last week need resolution, and several handover items from absent staff require attention.

urgent.subject: RE: IM Principles - change to URL

urgent.title: HRIS Dashboard workflow failures
urgent.sub: Multiple GitHub build failures across 5+ runs on 4 June (commits b97db4e, 5614c41, 30b1714, 92e4d02, 3147735). Needs investigation and fix.
urgent.subject: [begb0037admin/hris-dashboard] Run failed

urgent.title: James Salas Guillen handover - H&S and data work
urgent.sub: James is on annual leave from end of 5 June, returning 18 June. Handover document sent with outstanding items. You're covering with Chris Sanders.
urgent.subject: H&S Handover
